summary: Plan-only risk review over five open PR candidates. No merge, close, comment, label, or fix PR action is allowed by this job. The five candidate PRs all require single-PR human review because each touches a product-policy, approval lifecycle, OAuth/provider, active-memory, or SMS command authorization decision. Hydrated security-sensitive linked refs are quarantined separately.

actions.reason: Product behavior decision required: whether the UI should collapse these non-terminal internal tool errors after a successful assistant reply.
Approval lifecycle behavior requires human validation before any merge lane.
Active-memory prompt and recall semantics are product behavior, not a dedupe or safe automatic merge decision.
OAuth-adjacent provider behavior needs single-PR human review even though the hydrated artifact does not mark it security-sensitive.
SMS command authorization behavior is policy-sensitive and requires human review before any merge lane.
Security-boundary SMS channel context belongs to central OpenClaw security handling, not Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Approval-id lifecycle and security-boundary labeled changes should be handled by central OpenClaw security review.

needs_human: #90122: product decision on hiding/collapsing non-terminal internal tool errors after successful assistant replies.
#66685: approval-lifecycle decision on suppressing only expired/not-found approval followup warnings without hiding delivery or authorization failures.
#95888: active-memory product decision on freshness caveats and incomplete/truncated recall signaling.
#96322: OAuth-adjacent provider hardening decision before any single-PR merge lane.
#90998: SMS command authorization policy decision before any single-PR merge lane.
